# The Document Index

> The living index of document-AI tooling — OCR, PDF extraction, document parsing, layout
> & structure, table extraction and vision-language understanding — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-07-02T12:32:47.901413+00:00
Tools indexed: 202

## Top document-AI tools by momentum

- [baidu/Unlimited-OCR](https://github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR) — momentum 89, ⭐12961 — OCR Engines — Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
- [PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR](https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR) — momentum 86, ⭐84527 — OCR Engines — Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit
- [tesseract-ocr/tesseract](https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tesseract) — momentum 86, ⭐75060 — OCR Engines — Tesseract Open Source OCR Engine (main repository)
- [opendatalab/MinerU](https://github.com/opendatalab/MinerU) — momentum 86, ⭐73017 — Document Parsing — Transforms complex documents like PDFs and Office docs into LLM-ready markdown/JSON for your Agentic
- [docling-project/docling](https://github.com/docling-project/docling) — momentum 86, ⭐62519 — Document Parsing — Get your documents ready for gen AI
- [datalab-to/marker](https://github.com/datalab-to/marker) — momentum 83, ⭐37014 — PDF Extraction — Convert PDF to markdown + JSON quickly with high accuracy
- [ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF](https://github.com/ocrmypdf/OCRmyPDF) — momentum 82, ⭐34059 — OCR Engines — OCRmyPDF adds an OCR text layer to scanned PDF files, allowing them to be searched
